# Ethical Use Disclaimer

## SOC Automation Lab 2.0

This repository and all its contents — scripts, configurations, SPL queries,
workflow files, and documentation — are created exclusively for:

- Educational purposes
- Portfolio demonstration
- Cybersecurity skill development
- Authorized lab environments

---

## Authorized Use Only

All adversary simulation activity documented in this project was performed:

- Against virtual machines owned and controlled by the author
- On an isolated VirtualBox NATNetwork with no connection to production systems
- With no real malware, real backdoors, real persistence, or real exfiltration
- Using only benign, reversible, detection-validation techniques

---

## Prohibited Use

Nothing in this repository may be used to:

- Attack, scan, or probe systems you do not own
- Attack systems without explicit written authorization from the owner
- Conduct unauthorized penetration testing
- Deploy malware or unauthorized code
- Violate any applicable law or regulation

---

## Your Responsibility

If you clone or use this repository, you are solely responsible for ensuring
your use complies with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction,
including but not limited to the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (CFAA), the
UK Computer Misuse Act, and any relevant local equivalents.

The author accepts no responsibility for misuse of this material.

---

*Chinemelum Osholake | Smarkt Technologies Cybersecurity Division*
